Title: Medicare Claims Fraud Detection
Summary: Gradient-boosted classifier that flags suspicious Medicare Part B claims for human review by program integrity contractors.

Title: Health Document Translation
Summary: Neural machine translation pipeline for translating CDC public health communications into 14 languages.

Title: Clinical Trial Eligibility Matching
Summary: NLH model that matches patient records to NIH clinical trial inclusion criteria for recruitment.

Title: Hospital Readmission Risk Score
Summary: Predicts 30-day readmission risk to inform discharge planning at VA partner hospitals.

Title: Opioid Prescribing Outlier Detection
Summary: Flags providers whose opioid prescribing patterns are statistical outliers vs. peer cohorts.

Title: Grants.gov Application Summarizer
Summary: Summarizes long grant applications into one-page briefs for program officers.
